name: neon-postgres
description: Manage Neon Serverless Postgres projects and databases with the neon-postgres agent skill and the Neon MCP Server

interface.shortDescription: Manage Neon Serverless Postgres projects and databases
interface.longDescription: Use the Neon Postgres plugin to create and manage Neon Serverless Postgres projects and databases. Includes the Neon MCP Server for project and database management, and the neon-postgres skill with guides on connection methods, branching, autoscaling, Neon Auth, and more.
defaultPrompt: Use Neon to create a new Serverless Postgres database for my project and help me connect to it.
